domain: Solifugid (sun spider) sensory hair array — thousands of fine bristles + setae across pedipalp + body provide multi-modal (chemo/hygro/thermo/tactile/vibration) parallel sensing.
specific_mechanism: Massive parallel high-density cheap multi-modal sensor coverage feeding parallel processing.
llm_application: HAIRARRAY-INPUT: K=10000+ tiny cheap feature-detector modules at input stage, each computing a single named feature (n-gram, character class, special token, named-entity hint, language ID, profanity, etc.); dense sparse multi-channel feature vector added to standard embedding. Hairarray-style massive parallel multi-modal coverage.
novelty_claim: SensorLM aligns sensor data to language. TVL is multi-modal touch+vision. ViT uses patch embeddings. HAIRARRAY-INPUT differs by ADDING LARGE-N (10000+) per-feature cheap detector modules at embedding stage producing dense sparse feature signal — solifugid-style massive parallel multi-modal feature coverage.
